title: nvm_list discards out_count, missing Vec::with_capacity
description: nvm_list (nvm.rs:102-144) calls Vec::new() then push()s one NvmId per loop iteration, discarding the out_count value the C API populates on each call. If out_count on the first iteration reflects the total remaining objects, a single Vec::with_capacity(out_count as usize) before the loop would eliminate O(log N) reallocations. Expected impact: small in practice (NVM object counts are bounded by server config, typically < a few hundred), but the fix is zero-risk and the information is already in-hand from the first IPC round-trip.
